news: BioAge Labs reported positive Phase 1 results for BGE-102 showing 85% median reduction in high-sensitivity C-reactive protein, with Phase 2 CV trial planned for 1H 2026.

changes.reason: Strong 85% hsCRP reduction validates NLRP3 mechanism and supports Phase 2 readiness
Even in bear case, positive Phase 1 biomarker data reduces execution risk
85% hsCRP reduction exceeds typical biomarker thresholds and supports best-in-class potential

news: Nektar announced pricing of an upsized $325M public offering at $92/share to fund Phase 3 trials for rezpegaldesleukin in atopic dermatitis and alopecia areata.

changes.reason: Adding $325M net proceeds from the offering to existing $720M cash (less ~$25M fees)
Adding 3.53M new shares from the offering to current 29M shares outstanding
Increased dilution from additional 3.53M shares, though mitigated by strong funding for Phase 3
